ddls:
CREATE TABLE "suburbs" (
  "suburb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suburb */,
  "suburb_name" TEXT /* Name of the suburb */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the suburb */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the suburb */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of residents in the suburb */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the suburb */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the suburb */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suburb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertising_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertising option */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertising option (e.g., Option 1, Option 2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the advertising option */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of advertising (e.g., website, social media) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the advertisement (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the option */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the option (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_tiers" (
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing tier */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertising option */,
  "suburb_id" INTEGER /* ID of the suburb */,
  "price_per_month" REAL /* Price per month for the advertising option in the suburb */,
  "price_per_year" REAL /* Price per year for the advertising option in the suburb */,
  "price_once_off" REAL /* One-time payment price for the advertising option in the suburb */,
  "min_suburbs" INTEGER /* Minimum number of suburbs required for this tier */,
  "max_suburbs" INTEGER /* Maximum number of suburbs allowed for this tier */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage for bulk purchases or long-term subscriptions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_tiers_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES advertising_options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_tiers_suburb_id FOREIGN KEY ("suburb_id") REFERENCES suburbs ("suburb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "business_name" TEXT /* Name of the business */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the business */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the business */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the business */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the business's website */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the business (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertising option */,
  "suburb_id" INTEGER /* ID of the suburb */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, canceled) */,
  "payment_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment plan associated with the subscription */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscription is up for renewal */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Status of the renewal (e.g., pending, confirmed, declined) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES advertising_options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_payment_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_plan_id") REFERENCES payment_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_suburb_id FOREIGN KEY ("suburb_id") REFERENCES suburbs ("suburb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment plan (e.g., Monthly, Yearly, One-time) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment plan */,
  "renewal_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of renewal (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "grace_period" INTEGER /* Grace period for late payments (in days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscription_plans" (
  "subscription_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription plan */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription plan */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the plan is up for renewal */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Status of the plan renewal (e.g., pending, confirmed, declined) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscription_plans_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscription_plans_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES payment_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data point */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being tracked (e.g., clicks, impressions) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analytics data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the analytics data (e.g., website, social media) */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device type (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, business owner) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure storage */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, blocked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser or device used for access */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, business owner) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view analytics, manage subscriptions) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the permission (e.g., global, specific subscription) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscription_permissions" (
  "subscription_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription permission */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription permission */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription permission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the permission (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscription_permissions_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscription_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, financial) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file if it is stored on the server */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id")
)
